title: Add 19 crystal products to shop section and fix QR code in payment

requirements.text: Add 19 crystal products to the static products data file (frontend/src/data/products.ts). Each crystal must have two entries: one for the raw form and one for the bracelet form. All 19 crystals are: Clear Quartz (The Master Healer), Amethyst (Spirituality & Protection), Rose Quartz (Love & Compassion), Black Tourmaline (Grounding & Protection), Green Aventurine (Luck & Prosperity), Labradorite (Transformation & Magic), Selenite (Cleansing & Clarity), Fluorite (Focus & Clarity), Aquamarine (Calm & Communication), Malachite (Transformation & Heart Chakra), Black Obsidian (Negativity Shield), Carnelian (Creativity & Motivation), Moonstone (Intuition & Feminine Energy), Lapis Lazuli (Wisdom & Truth), Pyrite (Wealth & Energy), Tiger's Eye (Courage & Confidence), Moldavite (Transformation), Blue Lace Agate (Calmness), Garden Quartz (Grounding & Manifestation). Each product's base price must be ₹600 (raw forms) and ₹800 (bracelet forms) before any markup. The description for each must mention the crystal's metaphysical property (e.g., 'The Master Healer'). Product type must be 'crystal' for raw forms and 'bracelet' for bracelet forms. Image paths must reference the corresponding generated product images from frontend/public/assets/generated/.

quotes: Make these crystals as product photography for e commercial website display them in raw and bracelet forms each starting from 600 rupees
Display them in my crystal shop section

acceptanceCriteria: All 19 crystals appear in the ProductCatalog section as separate raw and bracelet product cards (38 total cards)
Each product card shows the crystal name, type badge (raw/bracelet), metaphysical property description, and price starting from ₹600
Filtering by 'crystal' tab shows all raw forms; filtering by 'bracelet' tab shows all bracelet forms
Product images render without broken-image errors

requirements.text: Replace the broken QR code image in the payment section (Appointment.tsx) with the newly generated correct QR code image saved at frontend/public/assets/generated/qr-code.png. Update the img src to point to this path. The QR code displayed must match the uploaded image exactly (Ishita Singh, UPI ID: 9305831180@pthdfc, Kotak Mahindra bank).

quotes: correct my qr code picture use this original qr code in payment section
the qr code is showing error

acceptanceCriteria: The QR code image renders without error in the payment step of the appointment booking flow
The displayed QR code matches the uploaded image (shows Ishita Singh, UPI ID 9305831180@pthdfc)
No broken image icon appears in the payment section

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui/
Crystal product prices must start at ₹600 for raw forms and ₹800 for bracelets as base prices before markup
QR code image must be served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/, not fetched from the backend
nonGoals: Adding backend persistence for the new crystal products (static data only)
Building a cart or checkout flow beyond what already exists
Changing the overall site design or color palette
